response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Developer with over 15 years of professional development across multiple stacks, which represents a significant mismatch with this junior/mid-level position. While the technical overlap is genuine — TypeScript, React, REST APIs, AWS, and Kubernetes all appear in the resume — the candidate would almost certainly be disengaged, undercompensated, and out the door within months. The listed location (Bangalore, India) also conflicts directly with the high on-site presence requirement. The missing explicit PostgreSQL experience and absence of NestJS are minor concerns by comparison; the seniority and location mismatches are the disqualifying factors.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience directly matching the core technical stack requirements
Demonstrated software craftsmanship ethos (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligning with the clean architecture interest listed in the JD
AWS and Kubernetes experience covers several nice-to-have qualifications, along with recent AI-agent and LLM integration work at re:cinq
concerns: Massively overqualified: 15+ years of Staff/Senior-level experience makes this a junior/mid role entirely unsuitable for career trajectory or compensation expectations
Current location in Bangalore, India is incompatible with the high on-site presence requirement
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; database background is primarily MongoDB and MySQL, with only generic SQL listed in skills
